title: Retain evidence for the framework's required period
description: Keep each control's evidence for its mandated retention window and prevent both early purge and indefinite hoarding.
body: Use when handling logs, approvals, or attestations that serve as compliance evidence. Do not let a generic log-rotation policy purge evidence before its retention period, and do not retain regulated personal data past its lawful limit. Actions: tag each evidence class with its required retention window, configure storage lifecycle to block deletion until that window elapses, and reconcile against privacy minimization for personal data. Validation signals include a test that evidence cannot be deleted before its window and a report showing each class's effective retention. Risk boundary: evidence purged early is an audit failure and over-retained personal data is a privacy breach; both escalate, and retention conflicts go to a human.
